name: seedr-tg
description: Async Seedr.cc to Telegram relay bot with persistent queueing

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Bot token used for intake and admin messaging.

TELEGRAM_API_ID.description: Telegram API ID for the premium uploader account.

TELEGRAM_API_HASH.description: Telegram API hash for the premium uploader account.

TELEGRAM_SOURCE_CHAT_ID.description: Source chat/channel ID that receives magnet links.

TELEGRAM_TARGET_CHAT_ID.description: Destination chat/channel ID for uploaded files.

TELEGRAM_ADMIN_CHAT_ID.description: Private admin chat ID for status and controls.

MONGODB_URI.description: MongoDB connection string used for queue state and auth/session storage.

SEEDR_TOKEN_JSON.description: Optional bootstrap Seedr token JSON; leave blank if using /seedr_auth.

TELEGRAM_USER_SESSION_STRING.description: Optional bootstrap MTProto session; leave blank if using /session_start.

WEB_API_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated browser origins allowed to call the web API.
